allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('lockfile version:', d.get\('lockfileVersion'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,':',v\) for k,v in d.items\(\) if any\(x in k.lower\(\) for x in ['os','lib','plat','arch','cpu']\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('devDeps:', json.dumps\(d.get\('devDependencies',{}\), indent=2\)\); print\('scripts:', json.dumps\(d.get\('scripts',{}\), indent=2\)\)")
